title: Invigorating Springy Japanese White Asparagus Tan Tan Udon
description: A mustardy and springy Japanese dish featuring white asparagus and long-fermentation-dough udon, perfect for a weeknight dinner with Mediterranean-friendly flavors.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the udon noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and saute the grated ginger until fragrant.
Add the Japanese mustard and soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the white asparagus to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the cooked udon noodles and add them to the skillet, tossing to combine with the asparagus and sauce.
Transfer the udon noodles to a serving bowl and top with thinly sliced green onions and sesame seeds.
